Title: Mais Alghanim
Description: Renowned Lebanese-Arabic grill spot near Kuwait Towers, rated 4.5 on Talabat with popular dishes like Tabouleh, Hummus, Family Savers Meal and Arayes meat.

Title: Ghraeyf
Description: Local favorite serving traditional Kuwaiti machbouss and grilled dishes—Chicken Majboos and Tashreeb Meat are top sellers; 4.0 rating on Talabat.

Title: White Robata
Description: Highly rated at Wanderlog for charcoal-grilled Japanese fusion dishes in a sleek setting at Sheikh Jaber Al-Ahmed Cultural Centre.

Title: Tatami Japanese Restaurant
Description: Fine sushi and Japanese cuisine in Shaymaa Tower (Dhai Complex), praised for its creative dishes and ambiance.

Title: KEI Downtown
Description: Long-standing Japanese fine-dining venue in JW Marriott/Al Assima Mall area, serving sushi and teppanyaki since 1981.

Title: OVO Restaurant
Description: Upscale vegan/vegetarian restaurant in Bneid Al-Gar offering elevated, globally inspired menus by Amal Chahine.

Title: Principale Ristorante Di Nino
Description: Italian seaside dining in Kuwait City—specializes in authentic dishes like pizza, lasagna, ravioli, and risotto in cozy, upscale atmosphere.

Title: Maki
Description: Modern sushi and Asian mains served in a tent-like setting with indoor/outdoor seating overlooking Kuwait Bay.

Title: Dar Al-Zalag
Description: Traditional Kuwaiti cuisine featuring machbouss and grilled dishes, available via Talabat delivery. Stylish comfort food.

Title: Ryoog
Description: Casual café offering Kuwaiti and Middle Eastern dishes—breakfast, salads, coffee—available on Talabat for convenient delivery.
